name: Poached Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a large pot.
2. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
3. Gently add the chicken breasts to the boiling stock and cook for 15 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the stock using a slotted spoon and allow it to cool in the cooking liquid.
Ready to use in any recipe calling for precooked chicken.
